Emma Gomez Minujin© 2026 · Buenos Aires

About me

Who I am

I'm Emma — a business graduate, digital marketer, and startup builder from Buenos Aires. I graduated with the highest GPA at Universidad Torcuato Di Tella and received the Medal of Honor. But numbers don't tell the whole story.

I'm someone who can't stop learning. Whether it's a new marketing tool, a conversation with a stranger on a train in Madrid, or a book I picked up on impulse — I absorb everything. Curiosity is my superpower.

I studied in Madrid at IE University, interned at J.P. Morgan, co-founded Billbreaker, and currently work as a Digital Marketing Analyst at Orka — all while genuinely loving what I do.

I'm also deeply passionate about animals, travel, and people. The best way to understand the world is to listen — really listen — to the humans in it.

CuriousAmbitiousEmpatheticAdaptableBuilderAnimal loverWorld traveler

Emma Gomez Minujin© 2026 · Buenos Aires

My Universe

What drives me

Beyond work and achievements, there's a world that fascinates me. Animals, places, people, ideas. I collect experiences the way others collect things — and I never want to stop.

"Stay curious. The world is too interesting to pretend you already know enough."

— A belief I live by

🐘

Animals

I'm fascinated by animals — their intelligence, their loyalty, their way of experiencing the world. If there's a dog nearby, I've already made friends.

🌏

Travel & cultures

Every new place teaches me something I couldn't have learned from a book. I travel to understand people, not just places.

🧠

Lifelong learning

I believe you can learn something from everyone. I read, I listen, I ask questions. Curiosity is what keeps me alive.

🤝

People & listening

I love hearing people's stories — what they've lived, what they believe, what makes them come alive. Real connection is everything.

"I'm not here to fit into one box — I'm here to explore, learn, and keep evolving."

— Emma
